scope: Canonical regression sample set for Tencent Video API parameter and capability closure, refreshed through the 2026-06-21 positive-tid and anonymous real-cookie replay evidence.

expected_highlights: top-level errorno=0
non-empty cover title
non-empty video_ids family

video_ids_count stays 0

api1.intent: Explicit API1 tid=453 positive cover-shell-only probe on a known public CID
expected_highlights: top-level errorno=0

expected_highlights: top-level errorno can remain 0
caller must inspect per-result retcode

expected_highlights: empty slots ignored

expected_highlights: success with 32 non-empty items

api2.intent: Second confirmed positive API2 tid success path in XML
expected_highlights: top-level errorno=0
same tested positive family as tid=535 and tid=540
second-sample confirmation already landed in the current summary artifact
caller should not assume the row is as field-complete as canonical tid=535 on every sample

content-type application/x-javascript
payload still reports errorno=0

api2.intent: Mixed valid + invalid tolerant batch in JSONP
expected_highlights: top-level errorno=0
order preserved as valid / invalid / valid
invalid row degrades into empty-shell fields

api2.intent: All-invalid JSONP batch parser edge case
expected_highlights: JSONP wrapper retained
consumer should not assume top-level HTTP success means valid rows
treat top-level success plus all empty_shell rows as an all-invalid batch

api2.intent: Duplicate VID counting with ignored empty slots in JSONP
expected_highlights: empty slots ignored
duplicate VID preserved

expected_highlights: success with 32 non-empty items
errorno=-111001
errormsg=idlist个数错误, 为0或超过限制
JSONP wrapper retained

api2.intent: Freeze the current repeated-callback precedence rule on API2 JSONP.
expected_highlights: callback=cb1&callback= keeps the cb1 wrapper
the reverse order callback=&callback=cb1 falls back to the default QZOutputJson shell
current evidence covers same-day anonymous plus real anonymous visitor-cookie replay on PC Web and Mobile H5

api2.intent: Freeze that wrong-appkey JSONP error shells still honor callback wrapper changes.
expected_highlights: errorno=10010110 / errormsg=appkey error
wrapper changes from default QZOutputJson to cb1(...)
current evidence covers same-day anonymous plus real anonymous visitor-cookie replay on PC Web and Mobile H5

api2.intent: Freeze the current lower-edge API2 tid boundary where 525 behaves as a stable local -111013 island instead of a new positive branch.
expected_highlights: errorno=-111013 / errormsg=禁止外部访问接口
same result repeats across XML and JSONP
second and third public samples keep the same local error-family island

query_parser_semantics.intent: Prove that repeated `appid` is first-value-wins on API1 by forcing the canonical branch and the text-bypass branch to diverge under a wrong appkey.
expected_highlights: first appid canonical -> appkey error branch
reverse order -> success text-bypass branch

query_parser_semantics.intent: Prove that repeated `appkey` is first-value-wins on API1 when canonical `appid` is active.
expected_highlights: first appkey good -> success
reverse order -> appkey error

query_parser_semantics.intent: Prove that repeated `appid` is first-value-wins on API2 XML by forcing the canonical branch and the text-bypass branch to diverge under a wrong appkey.
expected_highlights: first appid canonical -> appkey error branch
reverse order -> success text-bypass branch

query_parser_semantics.intent: Prove that repeated `appkey` is first-value-wins on API2 XML when canonical `appid` is active.
expected_highlights: first appkey good -> success
reverse order -> appkey error

query_parser_semantics.intent: Show that API2 JSONP `callback=1` rewrites the default wrapper instead of being ignored.
expected_highlights: content-type remains application/x-javascript
body prefix changes from QZOutputJson= to 1(
payload still reports errorno=0

query_parser_semantics.intent: Freeze the current tested repeated-`otype` parser rule on API2.
expected_highlights: `otype=xml&otype=json` stays on XML
the reverse order `otype=json&otype=xml` stays on JSONP
current evidence is only for the tested anonymous branch

query_parser_semantics.intent: Freeze the empty-callback exception branch on API2 JSONP.
expected_highlights: wrapper falls back to the default `QZOutputJson=` assignment shell
payload still reports `errorno=0` on the canonical valid sample

query_parser_semantics.intent: Freeze one representative parse-breaking callback shell on API2 JSONP.
expected_highlights: wrapper becomes callback-style but the current summary parser cannot recover the JSON payload
the sibling `callback=((` case shows the same early parse-breaking family

query_parser_semantics.intent: Freeze the positive boundary that punctuation-heavy callback values can still stay raw-passthrough on API2 JSONP.
expected_highlights: wrapper prefix changes to a raw-passthrough bracket-led shell
payload still reports errorno=0 on the canonical valid sample
`callback=[[` remains on the same raw-passthrough side of the new split

query_parser_semantics.intent: Freeze the negative boundary where adding `(` after `[` flips API2 JSONP into the widened parse-breaking family.
expected_highlights: wrapper becomes callback-style but the current summary parser cannot recover the JSON payload
the same widened parse-breaking side now also includes `{(`, `/*(`, `a[(`, `)(`, `](`, and `}(` in the tested branch
this is still a representative family boundary, not full callback grammar closure

query_parser_semantics.intent: Freeze the current no-observed-change repeated-`union_platform` branch without overclaiming a parser rule.
expected_highlights: `union_platform=3&999` and `union_platform=999&3` show no observed behavioral change in the tested anonymous XML branch
current evidence does not prove first-value-wins for `union_platform`

environment_replay.intent: Replay the canonical contract matrix under a real anonymous visitor-cookie environment.
expected_highlights: no new parameter-closure split relative to the anonymous baseline in the current tested matrix
aged-cookie and login-state remain the next environment-priority gaps

environment_replay.intent: Replay representative auth-ish and parser-sensitive semantics under the real anonymous visitor-cookie environment.
expected_highlights: tested auth-ish extra keys stay on the same observed branch on API1 and on API2 tid 535/540/541
repeated union_platform, repeated otype, empty callback fallback, and one parse-breaking callback shell stay unchanged in the current replay

environment_replay.intent: Replay the broader full semantics profile plus callback-tail probes under the real anonymous visitor-cookie environment.
expected_highlights: full semantics replay still produces no new parameter-effect branch beyond the current anonymous baseline
auth-ish extra keys remain ignored and the callback parse-breaking family stays aligned with the current anonymous baseline

environment_replay.intent: Keep a dedicated regression anchor for the anonymous `union_platform × 535/540/541` capability matrix.
expected_highlights: The richer `tid=535` row and the thinner `tid=540/541` rows stay structurally stable across the tested union_platform values
No tested union_platform value promotes `540/541` toward the canonical `535` field shape on the current public anchor vids

environment_replay.intent: Replay callback precedence and wrong-appkey error-shell contract cases under the real anonymous visitor-cookie environments.
expected_highlights: repeated callback keeps first-value-wins across the tested PC Web and Mobile H5 real anonymous replay environments
wrong-appkey JSONP error shells still honor callback wrapper control across the same tested environments

demo_entrypoint_anchors.intent: Pin the public URL -> CID -> canonical API1/API2 chain as a demo entrypoint regression anchor rather than only an interface-level capability sample.
expected_highlights: The demo extracts CID=mzc00200idzf2m8 from the URL
The canonical API1 -> API2 chain returns a non-empty detail row for z4102qfi0x4

demo_entrypoint_anchors.intent: Keep a dedicated anchor for the demo-level API2 batch-size override path without conflating it with the deeper API2 contract matrix.
expected_highlights: The demo accepts batch-size=1 and still returns non-empty rows
Caller-side batch diagnostics remain normal under the explicit override

demo_entrypoint_anchors.intent: Preserve a demo-entrypoint anchor for explicit union_platform override without overclaiming that union_platform is globally inert.
expected_highlights: The demo accepts an explicit union_platform override
In the current anonymous direct-call scope the override does not break the canonical non-empty detail path

demo_entrypoint_anchors.intent: Preserve a demo-entrypoint regression anchor for the API2 alternate positive tid family, with explicit Python/Go parity on the tested 540/541 public samples and the current 541 + union_platform=0003 spot-check.
expected_highlights: Both demos preserve the current thin-shell split: tid=540 retains duration while tid=541 drops duration on the tested public samples
The tested 541 + union_platform=0003 demo path stays aligned between Python and Go and does not enrich the thin shell

next_priority_samples: Aged-cookie and login-state variants of the canonical contract cases using `tools/tencent_cookie_env_from_headers.py` plus `tools/tencent_environment_matrix_probe.py`
Auth-ish and union_platform replay under aged-cookie or login-state once raw Cookie headers are available
API2 sparse-cluster discovery beyond the current `535/540/541` family, but only when a better hypothesis appears than the already-negative anonymous `641-647` jump-scan
Broader public-vid confirmation of the anonymous `union_platform × 535/540/541` matrix if another high-signal sample appears
